---
title: "Advising and Learning"
format: html
---

The MSDS program is committed to providing comprehensive support to ensure student success throughout the academic journey.

## Academic Advising

The MSDS Director is available to assist with course selection, program requirements, and academic planning questions. Please schedule an appointment via the links and contact info listed on the "Administrative Contacts" section. 

## Student Disability Services SDS

The goal of the [Student Disability Services](https://disabilities.uchicago.edu/) (SDS) is to provide resources, support, and accommodations for any students with disabilities at the university. Once you've completed the application process and submitted up-to-date documentation, staff from SDS will engage with you in an interactive process to identify necessary services and accommodations to ensure equitable access to University programs and services. 

## Newsletter and Calendar

Subscribe to our newsletters and calendar events to stay on top of our various events.

- [DSI events calendar subscription](https://calendar.google.com/calendar/ical/uchicago.edu_ekmspgr0ho1nmuhbi1rc3g577c%40group.calendar.google.com/public/basic.ics)
- [DSI events calendar](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/events/dsi-events/) weblink
- Newsletters
